why_it_matters: Given documented social isolation and unemployment, a recorded PHQ-2 screen validates the negative mood assessment and supports mental-health monitoring.
Confirming no prior adverse reaction is a mandatory contraindication check before administering the influenza vaccine given today.
Attributing fatigue to anemia, lung recovery, and unemployment with safety-netting guides whether further workup is triggered.
The PRAPARE safety and stress details complete the SDOH assessment but largely reinforce already-documented housing concerns and reassuring safety findings.
